description: PR2 scenario #1 — buffer-only reject. A section of 30 students has exactly one candidate room of capacity 32; with the default capacity_buffer=1.1 the planner needs 33 seats (ceil(30 * 1.1)). The single room fails ONLY the buffer gate — raw capacity (32) is enough. Expected reason: ROOM_BUFFER_REJECT.
notes: Site coverage: commit 3 swap at rooming.py:324 emits ROOM_BUFFER_REJECT through this path (the existing lecture_room_reject_due_to_buffer_count counter becomes the new buffer_only_rejects field).
